posts.author: MarianaAlmeida (Mariana Almeida)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there,

I have been requesting this feature for a while now when contacting the Monday Team. I really need to be able to export some tasks (which I have set up as projects on my main dashboard) to a PDF. Right now this is impossible. The same applies for the Gantt Chart. Can we have that feature created?
